mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (coach_id, day_of_week, time, content, status) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{time}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, coach_id, day_of_week, time, content, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY FIELD(day_of_week, 'MON','TUE','WED','THU','FRI','SAT','SUN'), time
SELECT id, coach_id, day_of_week, time, content, status, created_at, updated_at FROM reservation ORDER BY FIELD(day_of_week, 'MON','TUE','WED','THU','FRI','SAT','SUN'), time
